title: arpophyllum giganteum subsp. medium
intro: Arpophyllum giganteum subsp. medium, also known as the tall Arpophyllum or simply Arpophyllum, is a flowering plant species in the family Bromeliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant's leaves and inflorescences are commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
